title: manulea obtusa
intro: Manulea obtusa is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Manulea obtusa have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to possess health benefits such as wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Manulea obtusa are typically made by infusing the leaves in water to create a tea or decoction, which is then used to treat various ailments.
